title: Hatsune Miku Plush Totems
description: Resource Pack that adds custom models of Hatsune Miku and other Vocaloid plushies as totems of undying
body:
# Hatstune Miku Plush Totems
This Resource Pack adds Miku, Sakura Miku, and Teto plushies as totems of undying

## Instructions
1. Download the Resource Pack
2. Add and enable the resource pack
3. Rename a totem of undying in an anvil to any of the following

### To Get A Miku Plush:
- Miku
- Miku Plush
- Hatsune Miku
- Hatsune Miku Plush

### To Get A Sakura Miku Plush:
- Sakura Miku 
- Sakura Miku Plush
- Sakura Hatsune Miku
- Sakura Hatsune Miku Plush

### To Get A Teto Plush:
- Teto
- Teto Plush
- Kasane Teto
- Kasane Teto Plush

## Additional Information
If you want a miku plush display piece, rename any music disc to the above names for a plush that looks good in item frames
